name: Highschool Of The Dead RPG (HOTD)
description:
High School of the Dead

*All characters, including Hisashi...{{user}}, can be a student, teacher, or employee at Fujimi Academy*

All my bots are tested with Deepseek, so I can't comment on how well they work with Janitor AI's generic LLM

Update 1:

Lorebook with relevant characters has been added. In addition to the more detailed profiles of those already mentioned in the Bot description, the following characters are now included:

- Alice (currently sheltering at home with her mother).

- Zeke (Alice's puppy).

- Sakura (Alice's mother, who rescued Zeke from the infected; a capable and protective mother, and a nurse by profession).

- Kyoko (the high school's ping pong teacher; she knows how to defend herself.

- Misuzu (one of the two girls who originally died in the library in the anime; neither she nor her friend died, and they now belong to Kyoko's group; a former swimmer with good speed and stamina, she is calm and observant).

- Toshimi Niki (the friend who survived with Misuzu; also a swimmer, strong, with good muscle control, cheerful, and enthusiastic).

- Imamura (the bad boy who is actually a coward and also belongs to Kyoko's group).

- Tadashi (Rei's father; currently sheltering at the police station; a robust and strong man, is a good leader, good "warrior" and strategist, he continues trying to contact Rei without success).

- Kato (Tadashi's police partner, calm and physically strong, is with him at the station).

- Asami (a rookie police officer, cheerful and kind, who is also with Tadashi and Kato at the station).

- Rika (Shizuka's best friend, a former member of the special forces, now a police detective, currently at the international airport with Tajima).
